RETURN.description: lowest value belonging to the instance (Double.NEGATIVE_INFINITY if the instance doesn't have any low bound, Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY if the instance is empty)
RETURN.assertion: assert methodResultID == receiverObjectID.isEmpty() ? Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY : (receiverObjectID.hasLowBound() ? methodResultID : Double.NEGATIVE_INFINITY);
RETURN.content: lowest value belonging to the instance ({@code Double.NEGATIVE_INFINITY} if the instance doesn't have any low bound, {@code Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY} if the instance is empty)

RETURN.description: highest value belonging to the instance (Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY if the instance doesn't have any high bound, Double.NEGATIVE_INFINITY if the instance is empty)
RETURN.assertion: assert methodResultID == receiverObjectID.isEmpty() ? Double.NEGATIVE_INFINITY : (receiverObjectID.hasUpperBound() ? receiverObjectID.getUpperBound() : Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY);
RETURN.content: highest value belonging to the instance ({@code Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY} if the instance doesn't have any high bound, {@code Double.NEGATIVE_INFINITY} if the instance is empty)

RETURN.description: a new ordered list containing Interval elements
RETURN.content: a new ordered list containing {@link Interval Interval} elements
